traditionalUsesEn: Traditional Aboriginal food; exceptionally high natural vitamin C content studied scientifically.
traditionalUsesDe: Traditionelle Aboriginal-Nahrung; wissenschaftlich sehr hoher Vitamin-C-Gehalt.
activeCompounds: Vitamin C (ascorbic acid) at very high levels, ellagic acid, polyphenols
preparation: Fresh or processed fruit products; powders in modern foods.
cautions: Food use. Respect Indigenous supply chains and benefit-sharing.
historicalNotes: Among the highest vitamin C fruits measured globally.
